summary: Lead Capture System (Phase A) - All 21 backend tests passed. Fixed database initialization issue where set_leads_db was called at module load time instead of startup event.

notes.note: Backend-only testing as requested. No frontend UI for leads dashboard yet.

critical_code_review_comments: Lead intent detection correctly identifies booking, purchase, and inquiry intents
Contact extraction regex patterns work for email, phone (multiple formats), and name
Duplicate lead prevention working - same conversation_id won't create multiple leads
Multi-tenant isolation verified - tenant_a leads don't appear in tenant_b's list
MongoDB _id excluded from responses using projection {'_id': 0}
Email notification service has graceful fallback (logs instead of sending if RESEND_API_KEY not set)
test_credentials: No auth required for lead capture endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test leads created with TEST_ prefix tenant IDs for isolation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead Capture System (Phase A) fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/leads (list leads), GET /api/leads/stats (dashboard stats), GET /api/leads/{lead_id} (lead details), POST /api/leads/{lead_id}/status (update status), POST /api/leads/test-capture (test endpoint). Intent detection uses keyword matching with 50% confidence threshold. Contact extraction uses regex for email, phone, name. Email notifications use Resend with fallback to logging. Multi-tenancy enforced via tenant_id parameter.
passed_tests: TestContactExtraction::test_extract_name - extracts name from 'my name is' pattern
TestLeadStats::test_get_stats_today - returns today's stats (total, new, converted, value, rate)
TestMultiTenancy::test_tenant_isolation - tenant_a leads not in tenant_b's list
TestEdgeCases::test_ambiguous_intent - low confidence for ambiguous messages

mocked_apis.email_notifications: MOCKED - Resend API key not set, logs to console instead of sending emails
mocked_apis.google_calendar: MOCKED - OAuth not configured, returns mock availability data

bug_fixed.issue: Database not initialized error on /api/leads endpoints
bug_fixed.root_cause: set_leads_db(db) was called at module load time when db was still None
bug_fixed.fix: Moved set_leads_db(db) call to startup_event() after MongoDB client is initialized
